title: About the English dub change
wikitext:
[]: About the English dub change             Quote Post by Barinax » Mon Sep 17, 2007 7:13 pm I'm not sure what episode it was, but Shinji entered the Eva in regular clothes, but he left behind his plug suit. The English dub said something to explain this, exactly what was it? And was it a good change?

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Mon Sep 17, 2007 7:46 pm IIRC, the changed line was "His ego barrier is pseudo-substantiating his plug suit". That's just the dub's way of getting around the blooper in having Shinji's plug suit in there at all, he was in his street clothes just like you said. By the way, you can also see the tiara-like design of the (floating) interface headset if you look closely.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Mon Sep 17, 2007 8:19 pm How can a barrier pseudo-substantiate something? I suppose I could understand if his AT field was trying to regenerate his body, but... his plugsuit, which isn't even part of him? It makes more sense just to leave it as a blooper.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Sep 17, 2007 9:07 pm Maybe it's not so much a blooper since Shinji feels his sole purpose in life is Piloting Eva; hence his Plug-suit appearing instead? /My two-cents.

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Mon Sep 17, 2007 9:16 pm My take: It's a continuity error.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Mon Sep 17, 2007 9:50 pm It is a continuity error.

[]:             Quote Post by Sandoz » Mon Sep 17, 2007 10:50 pm But this is Eva ! It can't just be a simple continuity error! (Yes it can.)

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Mon Sep 17, 2007 10:57 pm THERE ARE NO CONTINUITY ERRORS YUI PREDICTED AND CONTROLS EVERYTHING!

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Mon Sep 17, 2007 11:25 pm Don't forget that Kaworu has Magic Jesus Palm Vaginas(tm).

[]:             Quote Post by Zeon » Mon Sep 17, 2007 11:38 pm I like to pretend that there was an extra plugsuit stashed away in the cockpit and it somehow came loose during all the 400% sync ratio business.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Mon Sep 17, 2007 11:41 pm BrikHaus wrote: THERE ARE NO CONTINUITY ERRORS YUI PREDICTED AND CONTROLS EVERYTHING!

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Mon Sep 17, 2007 11:48 pm DatDude wrote: THERE ARE NO CONTINUITY ERRORS YUI PREDICTED AND CONTROLS EVERYTHING!

[]:             Quote Post by shinesman_cobalt » Mon Sep 17, 2007 11:52 pm I never noticed that before.... :shock: A.. mistake....?! My faith in Eva has been shattered!!!!

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Tue Sep 18, 2007 1:00 am i've been wanting to post this for months, but i never got around to it and i thought everyone noticed it already. Besides, if its some nero-ego-lcl-reconstruction whatever, then he would have come out of instrumentality with the suit at the end of EoE. thus: error.

[]:             Quote Post by shinesman_cobalt » Tue Sep 18, 2007 2:02 am slothen wrote: i've been wanting to post this for months, but i never got around to it and i thought everyone noticed it already. Besides, if its some nero-ego-lcl-reconstruction whatever, then he would have come out of instrumentality with the suit at the end of EoE. thus: error.

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Tue Sep 18, 2007 2:35 am also, as to the title of this thread, is this error unique to the english dub? i don't think it is.

[]:             Quote Post by shinesman_cobalt » Tue Sep 18, 2007 3:47 am slothen wrote: also, as to the title of this thread, is this error unique to the english dub? i don't think it is.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Tue Sep 18, 2007 6:08 am Like Shinesman says, the dub crew noticed the continuity error and decided to invent some fancy dialogue to cover it up. One more continuity error not taken into account by the dub- the Entry Plug is shiny and intact in 20, but Zeruel's pounding had caused the plug to fracture and was threatening to destroy it (and Shinji inside) when the Eva went berserk. What happened to the fractures?

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Tue Sep 18, 2007 9:40 am hmm thats strange. I've usually watch the dub, and i've noticed that error for awhile, but i've never noticed any dialogue meant to describe it.

[]:             Quote Post by EvaCub » Tue Sep 18, 2007 10:27 am chee wrote: Don't forget that Kaworu has Magic Jesus Palm Vaginas(tm).
